claimText: Bitchat utilizes Bluetooth Low Energy Mesh Networking to enable communication.
evidenceExcerpt: Bitchat relies on Bluetooth Low Energy Mesh Networking to enable communication.
examUse: Statement-based question on the underlying technology of Bitchat.

claimText: A mesh network, also known as a multi-hop network, allows many-to-many communication where data can travel from any device to all others.
evidenceExcerpt: Mesh network, also known as ‘multi-hop network’, is a networking topology. In it, data can travel from any device to all others, achieving many-to-many communication.
distractorHooks: Requires a central router to relay data

claimText: In a mesh network topology, the network continues to function even if a single device fails because messages are broadcast and relayed by other nodes.
evidenceExcerpt: Even if one device fails, the network keeps working. Messages are broadcast and relayed by nodes until they reach the intended destination.
examUse: Statement-based question on the resilience of mesh networks.
distractorHooks: Network fails if the central node fails
Failure of one device disrupts the entire network

claimText: Bitchat operates without a central database, storing messages entirely on users' devices for a short period to prioritize privacy.
evidenceExcerpt: No central database: Messages are stored entirely on users’ devices and are deleted after a short period. This design is created to priorities users’ privacy.
examUse: Statement-based question on data storage and privacy features of Bitchat.
distractorHooks: Messages are stored on a central cloud server
Messages are permanently archived on a central database

claimText: Bitchat provides anonymous communication by using end-to-end encryption and not requiring user registration via email or phone number.
evidenceExcerpt: Messages are end-to-end encrypted and do not leave the network. No registration required: Users are not required to create accounts using their email or phone number, making the communication anonymous.
examUse: Feature-based question on the security and anonymity of Bitchat.
distractorHooks: Requires Aadhaar or phone number for registration
